brand.name: Copilot's Pub
brand.tagline: Where pros gather for real-world Microsoft Copilot tips.
brand.question: What can I do with Copilot today?

nav.search_placeholder: Search a tip, a prompt, a product…

barpub.bar_title: Where AIs meet around a drink
barpub.bar_body: Copilot isn't a single model — it's a bar where several frontier AIs gather. Thanks to multi-model orchestration, Copilot calls on the right model for each task — reasoning, writing, analysis, code — and serves you the sharpest answer.
barpub.bar_note: The right model, at the right moment — without you having to choose.
barpub.counter_body: A Cloud Solution Architect for M365 Copilot at Microsoft France, Axel serves up hands-on tips, prompts and scenarios. Place your order and he'll mix the right recommendation.

sections.m365_desc: Copilot built into Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Notebooks and Agents.
sections.chat_desc: Personal productivity, search, Scout, Deep Research and prompt engineering.

tip.comment_placeholder: Share your feedback or a variation of this prompt…
tip.comment_empty: No comments yet. Be the first!
tip.comment_pending: Thanks! Your comment will appear after moderation.

explorer.title: Explore Copilot
